title: DecodingTrust: A Comprehensive Assessment of Trustworthiness in GPT Models
what_it_gives_us: Main benchmark inspiration for evaluating trustworthiness dimensions
how_we_will_use_it: Use in Introduction, Related Work, and Methodology to justify benchmark-style evaluation
notes: Primary benchmark anchor for this assignment

title: Trustworthiness in Large Language Models
what_it_gives_us: Secondary framework to support trustworthiness dimensions and evaluation framing
how_we_will_use_it: Use in Related Work to support why trustworthiness must be multi-dimensional
notes: Do not over-focus on this; use as supporting literature only

title: Human-centered phishing susceptibility
main_focus: Why people are vulnerable to phishing
what_it_gives_us: Supports our focus on user vulnerability and controlled persona conditions
how_we_will_use_it: Use in Introduction and Related Work to justify phishing-susceptible users as the target setting
notes: Important: do not make deterministic claims about groups

title: How people detect phishing cues
what_it_gives_us: Helps justify our detection-task design and red-flag reasoning
how_we_will_use_it: Use in Related Work and Error Analysis
notes: Useful for discussing explanations and cue-based reasoning

title: Mitigation strategies against phishing
what_it_gives_us: Supports the gold-standard remediation steps in our scoring
notes: Helps define what good phishing advice should contain

title: Recognise and report scams
what_it_gives_us: Provides real-world recommended actions for recovery and reporting
how_we_will_use_it: Use in Methodology to define gold actions and in Discussion for practical relevance

title: What to do if you've been scammed
what_it_gives_us: Provides reporting, recovery, and support advice
notes: Very useful for remediation and supportive advice criteria

title: LLM fairness or safety auditing paper
what_it_gives_us: Can strengthen the fairness evaluation framing
how_we_will_use_it: Use only if needed in Related Work
notes: Optional; do not waste too much time here
